revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Values: *'''t''' for the name in '''T'''ibetan characters *'''w''' for the transliteration of the Tibetan name according to [[Wylie transliteration|'''W'''ylie transliteration]] *'''s''' for the phonetic pronunciation of the Tibetan name according to the [[THL Simplified Phonetic Transcription|THL '''S'''implified Phonetic Transcription]] *'''z''' for the spelling in the PRC's [[Tibetan pinyin]] ('''Z'''angyu Pinyin) *'''l''' for the pronunciation in the '''L'''hasa dialect, given in the [[International Phonetic Alphabet]] At current, the only mandatory portion is that the formatting will be off if you don't include a value for t or w (use [[Template:bo-wo]] to include only the Tibetan Pinyin). By default, the [[Tibetan]] link is directed to [[Tibetan alphabet]], but using "Tibetan" as link text. If the link text should be "Tibetan alphabet" as well, set '''script''' to "yes" or "1". If you would like it to point to [[Standard Tibetan|Tibetan language]] instead (which is appropriate if you are including a conventional spelling or anything else other than Tibetan alphabet), set '''lang''' to "yes" or "1". Example: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) yields: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) ==See also== *[[Template:Bo-textonly]] - template without language markers, for mid-paragraph text {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|| [[Category:Sino-Tibetan multilingual support templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Values: *'''t''' for the name in '''T'''ibetan characters *'''w''' for the transliteration of the Tibetan name according to [[Wylie transliteration|'''W'''ylie transliteration]] *'''s''' for the phonetic pronunciation of the Tibetan name according to the [[THL Simplified Phonetic Transcription|THL '''S'''implified Phonetic Transcription]] *'''z''' for the spelling in the PRC's [[Tibetan pinyin]] ('''Z'''angyu Pinyin) *'''l''' for the pronunciation in the '''L'''hasa dialect, given in the [[:en:International Phonetic Alphabet|International Phonetic Alphabet]] At current, the only mandatory portion is that the formatting will be off if you don't include a value for t or w (use [[Template:bo-wo]] to include only the Tibetan Pinyin). By default, the [[Tibetan]] link is directed to [[Tibetan alphabet]], but using "Tibetan" as link text. If the link text should be "Tibetan alphabet" as well, set '''script''' to "yes" or "1". If you would like it to point to [[Standard Tibetan|Tibetan language]] instead (which is appropriate if you are including a conventional spelling or anything else other than Tibetan alphabet), set '''lang''' to "yes" or "1". Example: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) yields: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) ==See also== *[[Template:Bo-textonly]] - template without language markers, for mid-paragraph text {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|| [[Category:Sino-Tibetan multilingual support templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Values: *'''t''' for the name in '''T'''ibetan characters *'''w''' for the transliteration of the Tibetan name according to [[Wylie transliteration|'''W'''ylie transliteration]] *'''s''' for the phonetic pronunciation of the Tibetan name according to the [[:en:THL Simplified Phonetic Transcription|THL '''S'''implified Phonetic Transcription]] *'''z''' for the spelling in the PRC's [[Tibetan pinyin]] ('''Z'''angyu Pinyin) *'''l''' for the pronunciation in the '''L'''hasa dialect, given in the [[:en:International Phonetic Alphabet|International Phonetic Alphabet]] At current, the only mandatory portion is that the formatting will be off if you don't include a value for t or w (use [[Template:bo-wo]] to include only the Tibetan Pinyin). By default, the [[Tibetan]] link is directed to [[Tibetan alphabet]], but using "Tibetan" as link text. If the link text should be "Tibetan alphabet" as well, set '''script''' to "yes" or "1". If you would like it to point to [[Standard Tibetan|Tibetan language]] instead (which is appropriate if you are including a conventional spelling or anything else other than Tibetan alphabet), set '''lang''' to "yes" or "1". Example: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) yields: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) ==See also== *[[Template:Bo-textonly]] - template without language markers, for mid-paragraph text {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|| [[Category:Sino-Tibetan multilingual support templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Values: *'''t''' for the name in '''T'''ibetan characters *'''w''' for the transliteration of the Tibetan name according to [[:en:Wylie transliteration|'''W'''ylie transliteration]] *'''s''' for the phonetic pronunciation of the Tibetan name according to the [[:en:THL Simplified Phonetic Transcription|THL '''S'''implified Phonetic Transcription]] *'''z''' for the spelling in the PRC's [[Tibetan pinyin]] ('''Z'''angyu Pinyin) *'''l''' for the pronunciation in the '''L'''hasa dialect, given in the [[:en:International Phonetic Alphabet|International Phonetic Alphabet]] At current, the only mandatory portion is that the formatting will be off if you don't include a value for t or w (use [[Template:bo-wo]] to include only the Tibetan Pinyin). By default, the [[Tibetan]] link is directed to [[Tibetan alphabet]], but using "Tibetan" as link text. If the link text should be "Tibetan alphabet" as well, set '''script''' to "yes" or "1". If you would like it to point to [[Standard Tibetan|Tibetan language]] instead (which is appropriate if you are including a conventional spelling or anything else other than Tibetan alphabet), set '''lang''' to "yes" or "1". Example: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) yields: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) ==See also== *[[Template:Bo-textonly]] - template without language markers, for mid-paragraph text {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|| [[Category:Sino-Tibetan multilingual support templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Values: *'''t''' for the name in '''T'''ibetan characters *'''w''' for the transliteration of the Tibetan name according to [[:en:Wylie transliteration|'''W'''ylie transliteration]] *'''s''' for the phonetic pronunciation of the Tibetan name according to the [[:en:THL Simplified Phonetic Transcription|THL '''S'''implified Phonetic Transcription]] *'''z''' for the spelling in the PRC's [[Tibetan pinyin]] ('''Z'''angyu Pinyin) *'''l''' for the pronunciation in the '''L'''hasa dialect, given in the [[:en:International Phonetic Alphabet|International Phonetic Alphabet]] At current, the only mandatory portion is that the formatting will be off if you don't include a value for t or w (use [[Template:bo-wo]] to include only the Tibetan Pinyin). By default, the [[Tibetan]] link is directed to [[Tibetan alphabet]], but using "Tibetan" as link text. If the link text should be "Tibetan alphabet" as well, set '''script''' to "yes" or "1". If you would like it to point to [[:en:Standard Tibetan|Tibetan language]] instead (which is appropriate if you are including a conventional spelling or anything else other than Tibetan alphabet), set '''lang''' to "yes" or "1". Example: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) yields: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) ==See also== *[[Template:Bo-textonly]] - template without language markers, for mid-paragraph text {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|| [[Category:Sino-Tibetan multilingual support templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Values: *'''t''' for the name in '''T'''ibetan characters *'''w''' for the transliteration of the Tibetan name according to [[:en:Wylie transliteration|'''W'''ylie transliteration]] *'''s''' for the phonetic pronunciation of the Tibetan name according to the [[:en:THL Simplified Phonetic Transcription|THL '''S'''implified Phonetic Transcription]] *'''z''' for the spelling in the PRC's [[Tibetan pinyin]] ('''Z'''angyu Pinyin) *'''l''' for the pronunciation in the '''L'''hasa dialect, given in the [[:en:International Phonetic Alphabet|International Phonetic Alphabet]] At current, the only mandatory portion is that the formatting will be off if you don't include a value for t or w (use [[Template:bo-wo]] to include only the Tibetan Pinyin). By default, the [[Tibetan]] link is directed to [[:en:Tibetan alphabet|Tibetan alphabet]], but using "Tibetan" as link text. If the link text should be "Tibetan alphabet" as well, set '''script''' to "yes" or "1". If you would like it to point to [[:en:Standard Tibetan|Tibetan language]] instead (which is appropriate if you are including a conventional spelling or anything else other than Tibetan alphabet), set '''lang''' to "yes" or "1". Example: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) yields: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) ==See also== *[[Template:Bo-textonly]] - template without language markers, for mid-paragraph text {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|| [[Category:Sino-Tibetan multilingual support templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Values: *'''t''' for the name in '''T'''ibetan characters *'''w''' for the transliteration of the Tibetan name according to [[:en:Wylie transliteration|'''W'''ylie transliteration]] *'''s''' for the phonetic pronunciation of the Tibetan name according to the [[:en:THL Simplified Phonetic Transcription|THL '''S'''implified Phonetic Transcription]] *'''z''' for the spelling in the PRC's [[:en:Tibetan pinyin|Tibetan pinyin]] ('''Z'''angyu Pinyin) *'''l''' for the pronunciation in the '''L'''hasa dialect, given in the [[:en:International Phonetic Alphabet|International Phonetic Alphabet]] At current, the only mandatory portion is that the formatting will be off if you don't include a value for t or w (use [[Template:bo-wo]] to include only the Tibetan Pinyin). By default, the [[Tibetan]] link is directed to [[:en:Tibetan alphabet|Tibetan alphabet]], but using "Tibetan" as link text. If the link text should be "Tibetan alphabet" as well, set '''script''' to "yes" or "1". If you would like it to point to [[:en:Standard Tibetan|Tibetan language]] instead (which is appropriate if you are including a conventional spelling or anything else other than Tibetan alphabet), set '''lang''' to "yes" or "1". Example: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) yields: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) ==See also== *[[Template:Bo-textonly]] - template without language markers, for mid-paragraph text {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|| [[Category:Sino-Tibetan multilingual support templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Values: *'''t''' for the name in '''T'''ibetan characters *'''w''' for the transliteration of the Tibetan name according to [[:en:Wylie transliteration|'''W'''ylie transliteration]] *'''s''' for the phonetic pronunciation of the Tibetan name according to the [[:en:THL Simplified Phonetic Transcription|THL '''S'''implified Phonetic Transcription]] *'''z''' for the spelling in the PRC's [[:en:Tibetan pinyin|Tibetan pinyin]] ('''Z'''angyu Pinyin) *'''l''' for the pronunciation in the '''L'''hasa dialect, given in the [[:en:International Phonetic Alphabet|International Phonetic Alphabet]] At current, the only mandatory portion is that the formatting will be off if you don't include a value for t or w (use [[Template:bo-wo]] to include only the Tibetan Pinyin). By default, the [[Tibetan]] link is directed to [[:en:Tibetan alphabet|Tibetan alphabet]], but using "Tibetan" as link text. If the link text should be "Tibetan alphabet" as well, set '''script''' to "yes" or "1". If you would like it to point to [[:en:Standard Tibetan|Tibetan language]] instead (which is appropriate if you are including a conventional spelling or anything else other than Tibetan alphabet), set '''lang''' to "yes" or "1". Example: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) yields: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) ==See also== *[[Template:Bo-textonly]] - template without language markers, for mid-paragraph text {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|| [[Category:Sino-Tibetan multilingual support templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Values: *'''t''' for the name in '''T'''ibetan characters *'''w''' for the transliteration of the Tibetan name according to [[:en:Wylie transliteration|'''W'''ylie transliteration]] *'''s''' for the phonetic pronunciation of the Tibetan name according to the [[:en:THL Simplified Phonetic Transcription|THL '''S'''implified Phonetic Transcription]] *'''z''' for the spelling in the PRC's [[:en:Tibetan pinyin|Tibetan pinyin]] ('''Z'''angyu Pinyin) *'''l''' for the pronunciation in the '''L'''hasa dialect, given in the [[:en:International Phonetic Alphabet|International Phonetic Alphabet]] At current, the only mandatory portion is that the formatting will be off if you don't include a value for t or w (use [[Template:bo-wo]] to include only the Tibetan Pinyin). By default, the [[Tibetan]] link is directed to [[:en:Tibetan alphabet|Tibetan alphabet]], but using "Tibetan" as link text. If the link text should be "Tibetan alphabet" as well, set '''script''' to "yes" or "1". If you would like it to point to [[:en:Standard Tibetan|Tibetan language]] instead (which is appropriate if you are including a conventional spelling or anything else other than Tibetan alphabet), set '''lang''' to "yes" or "1". Example: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) yields: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) ==See also== *[[Template:Bo-textonly]] - template without language markers, for mid-paragraph text {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|| [[Category:Sino-Tibetan multilingual support templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Values: *'''t''' for the name in '''T'''ibetan characters *'''w''' for the transliteration of the Tibetan name according to [[:en:Wylie transliteration|'''W'''ylie transliteration]] *'''s''' for the phonetic pronunciation of the Tibetan name according to the [[:en:THL Simplified Phonetic Transcription|THL '''S'''implified Phonetic Transcription]] *'''z''' for the spelling in the PRC's [[:en:Tibetan pinyin|Tibetan pinyin]] ('''Z'''angyu Pinyin) *'''l''' for the pronunciation in the '''L'''hasa dialect, given in the [[:en:International Phonetic Alphabet|International Phonetic Alphabet]] At current, the only mandatory portion is that the formatting will be off if you don't include a value for t or w (use [[Template:bo-wo]] to include only the Tibetan Pinyin). By default, the [[Tibetan]] link is directed to [[:en:Tibetan alphabet|Tibetan alphabet]], but using "Tibetan" as link text. If the link text should be "Tibetan alphabet" as well, set '''script''' to "yes" or "1". If you would like it to point to [[:en:Standard Tibetan|Tibetan language]] instead (which is appropriate if you are including a conventional spelling or anything else other than Tibetan alphabet), set '''lang''' to "yes" or "1". Example: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) yields: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) ==See also== *[[Template:Bo-textonly]] - template without language markers, for mid-paragraph text {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|| [[Category:Sino-Tibetan multilingual support templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Values: *'''t''' for the name in '''T'''ibetan characters *'''w''' for the transliteration of the Tibetan name according to [[:en:Wylie transliteration|'''W'''ylie transliteration]] *'''s''' for the phonetic pronunciation of the Tibetan name according to the [[:en:THL Simplified Phonetic Transcription|THL '''S'''implified Phonetic Transcription]] *'''z''' for the spelling in the PRC's [[:en:Tibetan pinyin|Tibetan pinyin]] ('''Z'''angyu Pinyin) *'''l''' for the pronunciation in the '''L'''hasa dialect, given in the [[:en:International Phonetic Alphabet|International Phonetic Alphabet]] At current, the only mandatory portion is that the formatting will be off if you don't include a value for t or w (use [[Template:bo-wo]] to include only the Tibetan Pinyin). By default, the [[Tibetan]] link is directed to [[:en:Tibetan alphabet|Tibetan alphabet]], but using "Tibetan" as link text. If the link text should be "Tibetan alphabet" as well, set '''script''' to "yes" or "1". If you would like it to point to [[:en:Standard Tibetan|Tibetan language]] instead (which is appropriate if you are including a conventional spelling or anything else other than Tibetan alphabet), set '''lang''' to "yes" or "1". Example: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) yields: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) ==See also== *[[Template:Bo-textonly]] - template without language markers, for mid-paragraph text {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|| [[Category:Sino-Tibetan multilingual support templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Values: *'''t''' for the name in '''T'''ibetan characters *'''w''' for the transliteration of the Tibetan name according to [[:en:Wylie transliteration|'''W'''ylie transliteration]] *'''s''' for the phonetic pronunciation of the Tibetan name according to the [[:en:THL Simplified Phonetic Transcription|THL '''S'''implified Phonetic Transcription]] *'''z''' for the spelling in the PRC's [[:en:Tibetan pinyin|Tibetan pinyin]] ('''Z'''angyu Pinyin) *'''l''' for the pronunciation in the '''L'''hasa dialect, given in the [[:en:International Phonetic Alphabet|International Phonetic Alphabet]] At current, the only mandatory portion is that the formatting will be off if you don't include a value for t or w (use [[Template:bo-wo]] to include only the Tibetan Pinyin). By default, the [[Tibetan]] link is directed to [[:en:Tibetan alphabet|Tibetan alphabet]], but using "Tibetan" as link text. If the link text should be "Tibetan alphabet" as well, set '''script''' to "yes" or "1". If you would like it to point to [[:en:Standard Tibetan|Tibetan language]] instead (which is appropriate if you are including a conventional spelling or anything else other than Tibetan alphabet), set '''lang''' to "yes" or "1". Example: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) yields: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) ==See also== *[[Template:Bo-textonly]] - template without language markers, for mid-paragraph text {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|| [[Category:Sino-Tibetan multilingual support templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Values: *'''t''' for the name in '''T'''ibetan characters *'''w''' for the transliteration of the Tibetan name according to [[:en:Wylie transliteration|'''W'''ylie transliteration]] *'''s''' for the phonetic pronunciation of the Tibetan name according to the [[:en:THL Simplified Phonetic Transcription|THL '''S'''implified Phonetic Transcription]] *'''z''' for the spelling in the PRC's [[:en:Tibetan pinyin|Tibetan pinyin]] ('''Z'''angyu Pinyin) *'''l''' for the pronunciation in the '''L'''hasa dialect, given in the [[:en:International Phonetic Alphabet|International Phonetic Alphabet]] At current, the only mandatory portion is that the formatting will be off if you don't include a value for t or w (use [[Template:bo-wo]] to include only the Tibetan Pinyin). By default, the [[Tibetan]] link is directed to [[:en:Tibetan alphabet|Tibetan alphabet]], but using "Tibetan" as link text. If the link text should be "Tibetan alphabet" as well, set '''script''' to "yes" or "1". If you would like it to point to [[:en:Standard Tibetan|Tibetan language]] instead (which is appropriate if you are including a conventional spelling or anything else other than Tibetan alphabet), set '''lang''' to "yes" or "1". Example: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) yields: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) ==See also== *[[Template:Bo-textonly]] - template without language markers, for mid-paragraph text {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|| [[Category:Sino-Tibetan multilingual support templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Values: *'''t''' for the name in '''T'''ibetan characters *'''w''' for the transliteration of the Tibetan name according to [[:en:Wylie transliteration|'''W'''ylie transliteration]] *'''s''' for the phonetic pronunciation of the Tibetan name according to the [[:en:THL Simplified Phonetic Transcription|THL '''S'''implified Phonetic Transcription]] *'''z''' for the spelling in the PRC's [[:en:Tibetan pinyin|Tibetan pinyin]] ('''Z'''angyu Pinyin) *'''l''' for the pronunciation in the '''L'''hasa dialect, given in the [[:en:International Phonetic Alphabet|International Phonetic Alphabet]] At current, the only mandatory portion is that the formatting will be off if you don't include a value for t or w (use [[Template:bo-wo]] to include only the Tibetan Pinyin). By default, the [[Tibetan]] link is directed to [[:en:Tibetan alphabet|Tibetan alphabet]], but using "Tibetan" as link text. If the link text should be "Tibetan alphabet" as well, set '''script''' to "yes" or "1". If you would like it to point to [[:en:Standard Tibetan|Tibetan language]] instead (which is appropriate if you are including a conventional spelling or anything else other than Tibetan alphabet), set '''lang''' to "yes" or "1". Example: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) yields: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) ==See also== *[[Template:Bo-textonly]] - template without language markers, for mid-paragraph text {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Sino-Tibetan multilingual support templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Documentation subpage}} Values: *'''t''' for the name in '''T'''ibetan characters *'''w''' for the transliteration of the Tibetan name according to [[:en:Wylie transliteration|'''W'''ylie transliteration]] *'''s''' for the phonetic pronunciation of the Tibetan name according to the [[:en:THL Simplified Phonetic Transcription|THL '''S'''implified Phonetic Transcription]] *'''z''' for the spelling in the PRC's [[:en:Tibetan pinyin|Tibetan pinyin]] ('''Z'''angyu Pinyin) *'''l''' for the pronunciation in the '''L'''hasa dialect, given in the [[:en:International Phonetic Alphabet|International Phonetic Alphabet]] At current, the only mandatory portion is that the formatting will be off if you don't include a value for t or w (use [[Template:bo-wo]] to include only the Tibetan Pinyin). By default, the [[Tibetan]] link is directed to [[:en:Tibetan alphabet|Tibetan alphabet]], but using "Tibetan" as link text. If the link text should be "Tibetan alphabet" as well, set '''script''' to "yes" or "1". If you would like it to point to [[:en:Standard Tibetan|Tibetan language]] instead (which is appropriate if you are including a conventional spelling or anything else other than Tibetan alphabet), set '''lang''' to "yes" or "1". Example: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) yields: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) ==See also== *[[Template:Bo-textonly]] - template without language markers, for mid-paragraph text {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Sino-Tibetan multilingual support templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Bo%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Values: *'''t''' for the name in '''T'''ibetan characters *'''w''' for the transliteration of the Tibetan name according to [[:en:Wylie transliteration|'''W'''ylie transliteration]] *'''s''' for the phonetic pronunciation of the Tibetan name according to the [[:en:THL Simplified Phonetic Transcription|THL '''S'''implified Phonetic Transcription]] *'''z''' for the spelling in the PRC's [[:en:Tibetan pinyin|Tibetan pinyin]] ('''Z'''angyu Pinyin) *'''l''' for the pronunciation in the '''L'''hasa dialect, given in the [[:en:International Phonetic Alphabet|International Phonetic Alphabet]] At current, the only mandatory portion is that the formatting will be off if you don't include a value for t or w (use [[Template:bo-wo]] to include only the Tibetan Pinyin). By default, the [[Tibetan]] link is directed to [[:en:Tibetan alphabet|Tibetan alphabet]], but using "Tibetan" as link text. If the link text should be "Tibetan alphabet" as well, set '''script''' to "yes" or "1". If you would like it to point to [[:en:Standard Tibetan|Tibetan language]] instead (which is appropriate if you are including a conventional spelling or anything else other than Tibetan alphabet), set '''lang''' to "yes" or "1". Example: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) yields: '''Vimalamitra''' ({{bo|t=དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|w=dri med bshes gnyen|s=Drimé Shényen|z=Chimê Xê'nyên|l=ʈʂʰìmeʔ ɕèɲẽ|lang=yes}}) ==See also== *[[Template:Bo-textonly]] - template without language markers, for mid-paragraph text {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Sino-Tibetan multilingual support templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
